title: Intensely Malty American Feta Bowl
description: A comforting, malty, and velvety American dish featuring feta, perfect for a sick day, served in a traditional Korean brass bowl. This recipe incorporates anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the malted milk powder, dehydrated garlic, and turmeric.
In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chicken broth to the saucepan and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the malt syrup and the malted milk powder mixture.
Let the mixture simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it has thickened slightly.
Stir in the crumbled feta cheese until it is fully incorporated and the mixture is smooth.
Transfer the mixture to a Korean brass bowl.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve warm.
